description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a clean, geometric facade. The main building is surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring a swimming pool, a hot tub, a tennis court, and several outdoor amenities such as a tree, a small shed, and a patio area. The house has a prominent rear deck with outdoor seating and a staircase leading down to the backyard. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by greenery and a few accent features. The overall design is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with large windows, a backyard pool, tennis court, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design is clean and geometric, emphasizing open, functional spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, entryway, and adjacent tennis court.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio, hot tub, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, hot tub, play structure, and tennis court.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the deck, staircase, and landscaping features.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with steps, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean lines
